title: Skill Properties
description: Frontmatter properties for a SKILL.md file in Agent Skills format

name.description: Skill name in kebab-case. Must match the directory name.

description.description: A clear description of what the skill does and when to use it.

version.description: SKILL.md format version (semantic versioning). Recommended for future compatibility.

license.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0, GPL-3.0)

compatibility.description: Compatibility requirements or dependencies (e.g., Requires Python 3.11+)

allowed-tools.description: Tool patterns required by the skill (experimental feature, format: Tool(pattern:*) Tool(pattern:*))

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for client-specific properties.

examples.name: data-processor
examples.description: Processes and transforms CSV data files
